---
title: "Pilot Analysis"
author: "Research Assistant"
output: html_document
bibliography: input/library.bib
---

# Introduction

This pilot references several works to justify our priors. See @smith2019ml for general ML background, and [@doe2020bayes; @doe2020model] for Bayesian and modeling perspectives. For a refresher, @brown2018stats is helpful. Placeholder to resolve later: @missing_key.

# Methods

We will use simple priors and sanity checks. Citations: @smith2019ml.
